raw.objective: “to estimate population based pharmacokinetic of valproic acid (VPA) and to determine the effect of treatment and additional disease on its performance in children with epilepsy” AND “to describe the pharmacokinetic of valproic acid in a population of epileptic children using bayesian program of analysis.”
raw.covariates: Tested: WT, AGE, Comedication (CBZ, DHP, PHB), additional disease. Included: WT, AGE
raw.observations: The final model has a higher predictive performance in prediction of the serum concentration than the basic model. The estimates were significantly affected by weight, age, CBZ and gastroesophageal reflux (GER). But only age and weight are included in the model. A relationship is observed between observed and predicted plasma VPA concentration, which is poor at high concentrations.
raw.dose: Steady state, oral doses in patients
raw.structure: One compartment model with first-order absorption and elimination
raw.equations: CL= (theta1+(theta2*AGE)+(theta3*WT))*(1+eta1) V = (theta4+(theta5*AGE)+(theta6*WT))*(1+eta2) Ka = theta 7 (Value taken from from Correa et al.) Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1)

extraction_target.title: Effect of treatment and additional disease on pharmacokinetic of valproic acid in children with epilepsy.

structural_model.description: One compartment model with first-order absorption and elimination

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: CL= (theta1+(theta2*AGE)+(theta3*WT))*(1+eta1) V = (theta4+(theta5*AGE)+(theta6*WT))*(1+eta2) Ka = theta 7 (Value taken from from Correa et al.) Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.dose: Steady state, oral doses in patients
study.objective: “to estimate population based pharmacokinetic of valproic acid (VPA) and to determine the effect of treatment and additional disease on its performance in children with epilepsy” AND “to describe the pharmacokinetic of valproic acid in a population of epileptic children using bayesian program of analysis.”

covariates.raw: Tested: WT, AGE, Comedication (CBZ, DHP, PHB), additional disease. Included: WT, AGE

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
